blocks.text: This slice moves the pure C7 security / policy decision domain.
The package imports C11 host integration types from public `internal/hostintegration`.

This slice does not move provider adapters, runtime/session/supervisor actors, ToolRef.Args / EventIngestor wiring, concrete sandbox/network/OS adapters, task DB/project/mwsd local API packages, packaging artifacts, private infra, secrets, or local machine state.
